name: CM_LABEL_FORMATTED
description: Advanced formatted label with slot-based templating. Supports format strings with {0}, {1} placeholders for STRING/IMAGE/NUMBER slots. Auto font fitting (scales down if overflow), scroll mode if fitting fails (horizontal/vertical). 2-second delay before scrolling. Wrap-around scrolling with masks.
visualForm: Flexible text/image container with auto-sizing, scrolling text when too long, gradient masks during scroll, inline images and styled slots
descriptionKo: 슬롯 기반 템플릿이 있는 고급 포맷 레이블입니다. 플레이스홀더로 STRING/IMAGE/NUMBER 슬롯을 지원하며, 자동 폰트 축소 및 수평/수직 스크롤 모드를 제공합니다.
descriptionEn: Advanced formatted label with slot-based templating. Supports format strings with {0}, {1} placeholders for STRING/IMAGE/NUMBER slots. Auto font fitting (scales down if overflow), scroll mode if fitting fails (horizontal/vertical). 2-second delay before scrolling. Wrap-around scrolling with masks.
